vector_metrics.basis: S_t reprojected from MODEL_WEIGHTS (fatigue+tactical+psychology); L_t mu_bias from DC-lambda residuals, sigma_chaos from weather+referee

scenarios.label: Base case
scenarios.note: The most likely flow — CAI's consensus across form, tactics and momentum.

scenarios.label: Upside · France click
scenarios.note: France's current form holds and they convert their chances — the tie opens up and they pull clear.

scenarios.label: Downside · Spain frustrates
scenarios.note: A flat, low-margin night — Spain sit in and the tie tightens, live to swing on extra time or penalties.

France: No glaring weakness — a balanced side on current form.
Spain: Blunter in the final third — fewer clear chances created.

match_flow.text: Attacking substitutions as both benches go for it
Level at full time 1-1 — into extra time
Fatigue tells — France find a winner in extra time

turning_points: Level at full time 1-1 — into extra time
Fatigue tells — France find a winner in extra time
risk_factors: Margins are razor-thin — a single moment likely settles it.
Model confidence is modest (32/100) — wide outcome spread.

reasons: France carries the sharper attack (3.50 vs 1.03 xG/match).
France grades higher on form & big-match composure (33% vs 29%).
Edge from the spot: France convert ~76% vs Spain ~73% — decisive if it goes to pens.
Current form favours France — group record 6W-0D-0L (+40 Elo) vs Spain 5W-1D-0L (+25).
explainability.why_penalties: A shootout is unlikely (12%) — one side should settle it inside 120'.
explainability.what_could_change: An early goal swings momentum; an injury to France's key creator, or Spain stealing a set-piece, flips it.

disclaimer: This platform is an AI-driven probability simulation built for entertainment and analytics purposes. Not betting advice.
